title: Escape the World
description: Provides a new goal to beat the game
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d0dd5e0f8c8bd829414d078b723c462f9ba2c9b.png)

# ⚠️ WARNING ⚠️ 
**This mod is still in very early development so things most likely will change.**

# Escape The World

## Information
Escape the World is a mod that adds a whole new goal to beating the game, instead of beating the Ender Dragon, you must find your way to "Escape the World", this is done by finding 4 gems around the world in specific locations, forging them into a special world override key, and finding the world escaper temple to open a glitch in the world for you to leave your world. This does not override the Ender Dragon fight so you can still do that if you would like to.

## Features
- New Structure
- Modified Loot Tables
- New Crafting Method + JEI Support
- Brand New Game Completion Method
- Custom Credits Screen
- Achievements

## Planned Features
- Better Completion Screen
- More Content / Goals
- Better Models & Textures
